statement: Illustrative claim: the example sensor reading indicates an anomaly at Example Site (schema demonstration only, not a real finding).
assumptions: The sensor was correctly calibrated at time of reading (unverified)
inferences: If calibration holds, the reading is above the site's typical baseline
unknowns: Whether a second independent sensor would reproduce this reading
missing_evidence: A corroborating reading from an independent instrument (ie-ev-0002, unfiled)
